The 'B29H' portion is inferred to correspond to a 2.5L 4-cylinder engine and SE trim for a 2019 Camry. Other specifications like body class, drive type, engine details, transmission, MPG, horsepower, torque, seating capacity, wheelbase, and curb weight are standard for a 2019 Toyota Camry SE 2.5L and are inferred based on this high probability.
